calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant (Notices)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Chuck Parker an Individual aka Charles Parker.

Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:13:12 a.m. and concluding at 11:30 a.m.

Mark Scott, Esq. appeared for appeared for plaintiff ORION FIRST FINANCIAL, LLC. via Zoom.

Matt Jacobs, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified via Zoom.

No appearance by defendant Chuck Parker an Individual aka Charles Parker.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Equipment Lease, Recovery of Personal Property; and Conversion was filed 1/24/22, and personally served on defendant 2/9/22

Default entered to defendant was entered on 3/24/22.

Does Defendants were dismissed on 5/25/22

After hearing the evidence presented, admitting exhibits 1,2, 3, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ORION FIRST FANANCIAL LLC and against the defaulted Chuck Parker an Individual aka Charles Parker as follows:

Damages/Principal - $104,618.73
Prejudgment Interest - $4,145.15.
Attorney Fees - $1,510.85
Costs - 840.00
Total - $111,114.73

Order signed after as drafted by counsel.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Sep-28-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
